text_block_list.text:
It's a new year, and the beginning of Narita
Brian's classic year.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.
choice_data_list: Yes?
Yes?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Do you have a kotatsu?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...I need one if I'm going to watch New Year's TV
shows. Oh, and oranges, too.
choice_data_list: Is all that really necessary?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Yes, it really is.

I set up my office with a kotatsu—a
blanket-skirted table with a heater
underneath—and oranges, just as Narita Brian
requested.

...She's currently warming her legs under said
kotatsu.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Turn on the TV. It's about to start.

text_block_list.name: TV Show Host
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Year! Thanks for tuning in to the first
"Race Bulletin" of the New Year!

text_block_list.name: TV Show Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Numerous racers had remarkable performances
last year, including Rice Shower, who brought
Mejiro McQueen's spring winning streak to a halt!

text_block_list.name: TV Show Commentator
text_block_list.text:
And those special three gave us a thrilling
competition for the Classic Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: TV Show Host
text_block_list.text:
Yes! And one among them became the face to
represent the whole year...

text_block_list.name: TV Show Announcer
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Please welcome the Umamusume of
the Year... Biwa Hayahide!

text_block_list.name: TV Show Host
text_block_list.text: Whoa! It's really her!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Haha... Hello.

text_block_list.name: TV Show Announcer
text_block_list.text:
So, Biwa Hayahide, I hear that Narita Brian, who
made her debut this past year, is your little sister.
Is that true?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That's right. My sister is an incredibly strong
racer. Thanks to her, it's been a year of
heightened focus for me as well.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I was only able to take the Kikuka Sho in the
Classic Triple Crown tour, but...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I think she has the potential to be Triple Crown
Champion.
Murmer...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
choice_data_list: (Brian, the Triple Crown Champion?)
(Brian, the Triple Crown Champion?)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hm.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: We're out of oranges. I'll go get some.

choice_data_list: (She's... completely unfazed!)

text_block_list.text: Rattle, rattle!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Amazon?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I just heard the news. Sounds like you're going on
the Triple Crown tour, eh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What of it?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'll be on the Tiara tour—the Oka Sho, Japanese
Oaks, and Shuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
...You know, I realized something when I saw you
in the Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
...That honestly, in my current state, I don't think
I could win against you just yet.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: So... I'll do it next year!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna take one year to polish myself up! I'll
take the Triple Tiara and get stronger!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Then, I want you to face me one-on-one at the
Arima Kinen at the end of the year! You better
not run away!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You aim for the three crowns and I'll take the
three tiaras. Then we'll see who shines brighter!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Well, that's all. Later.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Amazon, wait.
Whoosh... Whap!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: What's this? An orange?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: A parting gift. Take it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Heh.
choice_data_list: It should be an exciting race.
It should be an exciting race.

Was that because oranges are packed with
nutrition?

Was that because oranges are packed with
nutrition?
Giving her a fighting chance?
Giving her a fighting chance?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Heh.
choice_data_list: It should be an exciting race.
It should be an exciting race.

Was that because oranges are packed with
nutrition?

Was that because oranges are packed with
nutrition?
Giving her a fighting chance?
Giving her a fighting chance?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah. I saw it in her eyes. She's really planning
on getting stronger and bringing the heat.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I have high hopes for when we face off for real.
choice_data_list: Suppose we should do some training then.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Can we leave the kotatsu out?

I decide to leave the kotatsu out over New Year's
as a reward for training.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
That's exactly right. You need nutrients in order
to compete.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: And the two of us are... competing, after all.
choice_data_list: That's a good attitude to have.
That's a good attitude to have.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...I'm just repeating what my big sis said once.
They're not my own words.

Narita Brian wastes no time getting back under
the kotatsu and eating oranges.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Heh. I wouldn't call that enough to make a
difference.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tell me, what kind of strategy do you have in
mind for me?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
What kind of training will ensure I can face off
against Ama after she takes the three tiaras?

And so, I get an early start to this year's race
strategizing with a battle-hungry Narita Brian.
